introSection: Moncayo is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Zaragoza in Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragon, Spain.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: The Moncayo Range is a mountain chain in Zaragoza.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster is very similar to the S.D.C. Galaxi model. Purple track with green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The Cars are decorated mimicking a car and have "Moncayo" written in lowercase. In the front of each car there is a Robles Bouso badge.

fullText:
Moncayo is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Zaragoza in Zaragoza, Zaragoza, Aragon, Spain.

The Moncayo Range is a mountain chain in Zaragoza.

This roller coaster is very similar to the S.D.C. Galaxi model. Purple track with green supports.

The Cars are decorated mimicking a car and have "Moncayo" written in lowercase. In the front of each car there is a Robles Bouso badge.
